description: Web UI testing: verifies the login form renders correctly with username and password fields visible on the browser page.
Web frontend testing: validates all primary navigation links in the top navbar are visible and accessible to users.
Web responsive design testing: checks layout behavior on mobile viewport sizes ensuring the hamburger menu appears.
Web form testing: validates client-side form validation displays required field errors when submitting empty registration forms.

code_snippet:
def test_dark_mode_toggle():
    toggle = page.locator('#theme-toggle')
    toggle.click()
    assert 'dark' in page.get_attribute('html', 'class')
description: Web theme testing: tests the dark mode theme toggle switches the page class attribute and persists user preference.

code_snippet:
def test_cookie_banner():
    page.goto('/')
    banner = page.locator('.cookie-consent')
    assert banner.is_visible()
    banner.locator('button.accept').click()
    assert not banner.is_visible()
description: Web cookie consent testing: ensures cookie consent banner appears on first visit and dismisses after accepting cookies.

code_snippet:
def test_search_autocomplete():
    input_el = page.locator('#search')
    input_el.fill('pyt')
    suggestions = page.locator('.autocomplete-item')
    assert suggestions.count() > 0
description: Web search UI testing: tests search autocomplete suggests relevant results as the user types partial query strings.

code_snippet:
def test_modal_dialog():
    page.click('#open-modal')
    modal = page.locator('.modal')
    assert modal.is_visible()
    page.click('.modal-close')
    assert not modal.is_visible()
description: Web modal component testing: verifies modal dialog opens on trigger click and closes properly when the close button is pressed.

code_snippet:
def test_pagination():
    page.click('.next-page')
    assert '/page/2' in page.url
    items = page.locator('.list-item')
    assert items.count() == 10
description: Web pagination testing: tests pagination controls navigate to the next page and display the correct number of list items.

code_snippet:
def test_image_lazy_load():
    page.evaluate('window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)')
    img = page.locator('img[data-src]')
    assert img.get_attribute('src') is not None
description: Web performance UI testing: checks lazy-loaded images fetch their src attribute only after scrolling into the viewport.

code_snippet:
def test_breadcrumb():
    page.goto('/products/electronics')
    crumbs = page.locator('.breadcrumb a')
    texts = [c.inner_text() for c in crumbs.all()]
    assert 'Home' in texts and 'Products' in texts
description: Web navigation testing: validates breadcrumb navigation shows correct hierarchy from home through category pages.

code_snippet:
def test_tooltip():
    icon = page.locator('.info-icon')
    icon.hover()
    tooltip = page.locator('.tooltip')
    assert tooltip.is_visible()
    assert 'help' in tooltip.inner_text().lower()
description: Web accessibility testing: tests tooltip appears on hover over info icons and displays helpful contextual text.

code_snippet:
def test_tab_switching():
    page.click('#tab-settings')
    assert page.locator('#panel-settings').is_visible()
    assert not page.locator('#panel-profile').is_visible()
description: Web tab component testing: verifies tab component switches visible panel content when different tabs are selected.

code_snippet:
def test_file_upload_ui():
    page.set_input_files('#file-input', 'test.pdf')
    preview = page.locator('.file-preview')
    assert 'test.pdf' in preview.inner_text()
description: Web file upload testing: tests file upload widget shows filename preview after user selects a document for upload.

code_snippet:
def test_accordion():
    page.click('.accordion-header')
    content = page.locator('.accordion-body')
    assert content.is_visible()
description: Web accordion component testing: checks accordion component expands content section when header is clicked by the user.

code_snippet:
def test_skeleton_loader():
    page.goto('/dashboard')
    loader = page.locator('.skeleton')
    assert loader.count() > 0
    page.wait_for_selector('.skeleton', state='hidden')
description: Web loading state testing: tests skeleton loading placeholders appear during data fetch and disappear when content loads.

code_snippet:
def test_dropdown_menu():
    page.click('#user-menu')
    menu = page.locator('.dropdown-items')
    assert menu.is_visible()
    assert menu.locator('text=Logout').is_visible()
description: Web dropdown menu testing: verifies user dropdown menu opens and contains expected account action links including logout.

code_snippet:
def test_carousel():
    page.click('.carousel-next')
    active = page.locator('.carousel-slide.active')
    assert active.get_attribute('data-index') == '1'
description: Web carousel component testing: tests image carousel advances to the next slide when next button is clicked.

code_snippet:
def test_toast_notification():
    page.click('#save-btn')
    toast = page.locator('.toast-success')
    assert toast.is_visible()
    assert 'saved' in toast.inner_text().lower()
description: Web notification testing: checks success toast notification appears after saving form data with confirmation message.
